prompt: Create a vertical hero card with a title and body.
openui:
root = Stack([hero], "column")
hero_title = TextContent(":hero.title")
hero_body = TextContent(":hero.body")
hero = Card([hero_title, hero_body])

prompt: Add a primary call-to-action button under a short text line.
openui:
root = Stack([copy, cta], "column")
copy = TextContent(":copy.line")
cta = Button(":cta.label")

prompt: Feature heading above two side-by-side cards and a follow-up action.
openui:
root = Stack([heading, cards, cta], "column")
heading = TextContent(":feat.heading")
a_title = TextContent(":feat.a.title")
a_body = TextContent(":feat.a.body")
a = Card([a_title, a_body])
b_title = TextContent(":feat.b.title")
b_body = TextContent(":feat.b.body")
b = Card([b_title, b_body])
cards = Stack([a, b], "row")
cta = Button(":feat.cta")

root = Stack([primary, secondary], "row")
primary = Button(":actions.primary")
secondary = Button(":actions.secondary")

prompt: Nested stack with title text, body text, and a button.
openui:
root = Stack([title, body, action], "column")
title = TextContent(":panel.title")
body = TextContent(":panel.body")
action = Button(":panel.action")

prompt: Pricing card with title, body, and subscribe button.
openui:
root = Stack([plan, subscribe], "column")
plan_title = TextContent(":pricing.title")
plan_body = TextContent(":pricing.body")
plan = Card([plan_title, plan_body])
subscribe = Button(":pricing.cta")

prompt: Page header text above a card.
openui:
root = Stack([header, main], "column")
header = TextContent(":header.title")
main_title = TextContent(":main.title")
main_body = TextContent(":main.body")
main = Card([main_title, main_body])

prompt: Simple form with email input and submit button.
openui:
root = Stack([title, form], "column")
title = TextContent(":form.title")
email = Input("email", ":form.email.placeholder")
field = FormControl(":form.email.label", email)
submit = Button(":form.submit")
actions = Buttons([submit])
form = Form("contact", actions, [field])

prompt: Hero image block with caption text.
openui:
root = Stack([hero, caption], "column")
hero = ImageBlock(":assets.hero", ":hero.alt")
caption = TextContent(":hero.caption")

prompt: Show an informational callout with title and description.
Section heading and divider above two placeholder-driven tabs.
openui:
root = Stack([heading, rule, tabs], "column")
heading = TextContent(":tab.heading")
rule = Separator()
body1 = TextContent(":tab.one.body")
body2 = TextContent(":tab.two.body")
i1 = TabItem("one", ":tab.one.trigger", [body1])
i2 = TabItem("two", ":tab.two.trigger", [body2])
tabs = Tabs([i1, i2])

prompt: Modal dialog with title and body text.
openui:
root = Stack([dialog], "column")
body = TextContent(":modal.body")
dialog = Modal(":modal.title", true, [body])

prompt: Card with CardHeader title/subtitle and body text.
openui:
root = Stack([card], "column")
head = CardHeader(":card.head.title", ":card.head.subtitle")
body = TextContent(":card.body")
card = Card([head, body])

prompt: Labeled email FormControl with submit button.
openui:
root = Stack([form], "column")
email = Input("email", ":signup.email.placeholder")
fc = FormControl(":signup.email.label", email)
submit = Button(":signup.submit")
btns = Buttons([submit])
form = Form("signup", btns, [fc])

prompt: Settings stack with switch and slider controls.
openui:
root = Stack([title, notify, volume], "column")
title = TextContent(":settings.title")
notify = SwitchItem(":settings.notify.label", ":settings.notify.description", ":settings.notify.name")
volume = Slider(":settings.volume.name", "continuous", 0, 100, 1, [40], ":settings.volume.label")

prompt: Dashboard header, divider, paired metric cards, and a refresh action.
openui:
root = Stack([header, rule, metrics, refresh], "column")
header = TextContent(":dash.header")
rule = Separator()
m1_title = TextContent(":dash.m1.title")
m1_body = TextContent(":dash.m1.body")
m1 = Card([m1_title, m1_body])
m2_title = TextContent(":dash.m2.title")
m2_body = TextContent(":dash.m2.body")
m2 = Card([m2_title, m2_body])
metrics = Stack([m1, m2], "row")
refresh = Button(":dash.refresh")

prompt: Two text sections divided by a separator.
openui:
root = Stack([top, rule, bottom], "column")
top = TextContent(":section.top")
rule = Separator()
bottom = TextContent(":section.bottom")

prompt: Login screen with email, password inputs and continue button.
openui:
root = Stack([title, email, password, continueBtn], "column")
title = TextContent(":auth.title")
email = Input("email", ":auth.email.placeholder", "email")
password = Input("password", ":auth.password.placeholder", "password")
continueBtn = Button(":auth.continue")

prompt: Intro with two side-by-side image blocks and a CTA.
openui:
root = Stack([intro, imgs, cta], "column")
intro = TextContent(":gallery.intro")
img1 = ImageBlock(":assets.gallery_one", ":gallery.img1.alt")
img2 = ImageBlock(":assets.gallery_two", ":gallery.img2.alt")
imgs = Stack([img1, img2], "row")
cta = Button(":gallery.cta")
